inputs.name: in
inputs.label: List
inputs.description: Array to extract an item from.

inputs.name: index
inputs.label: Index Override
inputs.description: Zero-based index to use, overriding the configured value.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Item
outputs.description: Item at the specified index (or slice if Slice End is set).

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: Count
outputs.description: Total number of items in the input list.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the index was out of range.
